  object Query: TADOQuery
    Connection = DModule.ADOConnection
    CursorLocation = clUseServer
    BeforeClose = QueryBeforeClose
    Parameters = <>
    SQL.Strings = (
      'SELECT %TOPRECORDS * '
      'FROM TABLE_NAME'
      'WHERE %CONDITIONALS AND %SEARCH'
      '%SORTORDER')
    Left = 324
    Top = 132
  end
  object ExcelApplication1: TExcelApplication
    AutoConnect = False
    ConnectKind = ckRunningOrNew
    AutoQuit = False
    Left = 16
    Top = 224
  end
  object ppexport: TPopupMenu
    Images = ImageList
    Left = 16
    Top = 192
    object ExportEasy: TMenuItem
      Caption = 'Eksportuj do Excela'
      ImageIndex = 16
      OnClick = ExportEasyClick
    end
    object ExportHtml: TMenuItem
      Caption = 'Eksportuj do pliku'
      ImageIndex = 15
      OnClick = ExportHtmlClick
    end
  end
end
